metadata.description: Self-hosted marketplace for the claude-statusbar plugin. Add with `/plugin marketplace add leeguooooo/claude-code-usage-bar`, then `/plugin install claude-statusbar`. The plugin wires Claude Code statusLine + slash commands; the render engine is the `cs` CLI from PyPI. v3.29.3 fixes the systemd respawn loop and reads the mentions_only contract field; v3.29.2 fixes a launchd respawn loop and halves warm render time; v3.29.1 fixes a daemon crash on slow renders; v3.29.0 redesigns the AgentParty block and fixes the listener-heartbeat and daemon-restart bugs.

plugins.name: claude-statusbar
plugins.description: Lightweight Claude Code status-line monitor: 5h/7d rate-limit usage, reset timers, projection/forecast, model + context, prompt-cache countdown, optional cost/balance, project/branch/session/activity lines, and a local AgentParty bridge for Codex workflows (`show_party`). 3 styles x 9 themes. Requires the `cs` CLI from PyPI.
